chips.label: From Prague to Vienna, in 10 days, 2 persons, any budget
chips.prompt: Plan a 10-day trip from Prague to Vienna for 2 people, any budget.

chips.label: Small 5 days vacation in Budapest
chips.prompt: Plan a 5-day trip from Berlin to Budapest for 1 person, mid-range budget.

chips.label: Long weekend in Kyoto — temples & a ryokan
chips.prompt: Plan a 4-day trip from San Francisco to Kyoto for 2 people, focused on temples with a ryokan stay, mid-range budget.

chips.label: 10 days Patagonia, hiking & lodges
chips.prompt: Plan a 10-day trip from London to El Calafate, Patagonia for 2 people, hiking and lodges, higher budget.

chips.label: 6 days Lisbon & Sintra, food + design
chips.prompt: Plan a 6-day trip from New York to Lisbon and Sintra for 2 people, food and design focus, mid-range budget.

Hero.description: One sentence of intent. The agent parses it, searches, and assembles a plan you can inspect and approve — step by step.
Hero.title: Describe your trip.
